blocked_items.title: Chinese hackers use new Atlas RAT malware in European cyberattacks
rejection_reasons: RULE1: Synthetic actor name detected: 'Unknown State-Sponsored Actor'
RULE8: Downgraded from PREMIUM_CTI: confidence=23% (<70 required); source_count=1 (<2 required); verified_sources=1 (<2 required); ioc_count=0 (must be >0); evidence_strength=LOW (<MEDIUM required)
RULE9: API contract missing fields: ['evidence_ledger', 'confidence_reason', 'source_reliability', 'verification_status', 'attribution_status', 'ioc_quality', 'ttp_quality', 'report_quality']
required_remediation: Set actor_display_name='Unknown Actor', actor_confidence=0, attribution_status='UNATTRIBUTED' (was: 'Unknown State-Sponsored Actor')
evidence_ledger was missing — auto-generated from available fields. Add explicit evidence_ledger in report generator for production.

Add required API fields: ['evidence_ledger', 'confidence_reason', 'source_reliability', 'verification_status', 'attribution_status', 'ioc_quality', 'ttp_quality', 'report_quality']. These are mandatory for enterprise and MSSP consumers.
